vineyard.exampleZh: 瑪歌酒莊的葡萄園是世界上最偉大、最受歡迎的紅酒的生產商之一。

girlie.definition: A magazine targeting an adult male audience and containing nude or semi-nude photographs of women.
girlie.example: Mary is not a girlie girl.
girlie.exampleZh: 瑪麗不是一個娘娘腔的女孩。

advertise.definition: To give (especially public) notice of (something); to announce publicly.
advertise.example: For personal needs, advertise on the internet or in a local newspaper.
advertise.exampleZh: 出於個人需求，請在網路或當地報紙上做廣告。

unanimous.definition: Based on unanimity, assent or agreement.
unanimous.example: The debate went on for hours, but in the end the decision was unanimous.
unanimous.exampleZh: 辯論持續了幾個小時，但最終一致決定。

brewing.definition: To make tea or coffee by mixing tea leaves or coffee beans with hot water.

stung.definition: To hurt, usually by introducing poison or a sharp point, or both.
stung.example: Right so came out an adder of a little heathbush, and it stung a knight in the foot.
stung.exampleZh: 就這樣，一條小石南叢中出現了一條蝰蛇，它蜇了一位騎士的腳。

homesick.definition: (with for) missing one's home and family very much when away; nostalgic

baptism.definition: A Christian sacrament, by which one is received into a church and sometimes given a name, generally involving the candidate to be anointed with or submerged in water.
baptism.example: She went to be churched before the baptism.

thunderclap.definition: A sudden, loud thunder caused by a nearby lightning strike; a shock of thunder, as opposed to a reverberating rumble
thunderclap.example: The thunderclap echoed loudly through the dark sky.
thunderclap.exampleZh: 雷霆轟鳴，響徹漆黑的天空。

unforgettable.definition: Very difficult or impossible to forget
unforgettable.example: The things he subjected me to were horrible and unforgettable.
unforgettable.exampleZh: 他讓我經歷的事情是可怕而難忘的。

chimp.definition: To review each image on a digital camera after it is taken.
chimp.example: The angry chimp went up the sidewalk and ripped everybody's face off.
chimp.exampleZh: 憤怒的黑猩猩走上人行道，撕掉了每個人的臉。

inevitably.definition: In a manner that is impossible to avoid or prevent.
inevitably.example: Despite the town's best efforts, the dam inevitably gave way.
inevitably.exampleZh: 儘管該鎮盡了最大努力，大壩還是不可避免地垮塌了。

retribution.definition: Punishment inflicted in the spirit of moral outrage or personal vengeance.
retribution.example: When the system is failing, violent acts of retribution increase.
retribution.exampleZh: 當系統故障時，暴力報復行為就會增加。

afterward.definition: (temporal location) At a later or succeeding time.

carcass.definition: The body of a dead animal.
carcass.example: The rabbit carcass was crawling with maggots.
carcass.exampleZh: 兔子的屍體上爬滿了蛆。

surrogate.definition: A substitute (usually of a person, position or role).
surrogate.example: A mixture of horseradish and mustard often serves as a surrogate for wasabi.
surrogate.exampleZh: 辣根和芥末的混合物通常用作芥末的替代品。

retainer.definition: Any thing or person that retains.
retainer.example: This lawyer charges a retainer for his work.
retainer.exampleZh: 這位律師為其工作收取聘用費。

notary.definition: A lawyer of noncontentious private civil law who drafts, takes, and records legal instruments for private parties, and provides legal advice, but does not appear in court on clients' behalf.
notary.example: The notary acted as an attester of the contract.
notary.exampleZh: 公證人擔任契約的證明人。

specs.definition: Two similar or identical things taken together; often followed by of.
specs.example: Do you write specs before you write code?
specs.exampleZh: 你在寫程式之前先寫規範嗎？

withdrew.definition: To pull (something) back, aside, or away.

degenerate.definition: One who is degenerate, who has fallen from previous stature; an immoral person.
degenerate.example: Live can so easily degenerate into something sordid and vulgar.
degenerate.exampleZh: 生活很容易就墮落成骯髒、庸俗的東西。

frenzy.definition: A state of wild activity or panic.
frenzy.example: She went into a cleaning frenzy to prepare for the unexpected guests.
frenzy.exampleZh: 她開始瘋狂地打掃衛生，為不速之客做準備。

mound.definition: An artificial hill or elevation of earth; a raised bank; an embankment thrown up for defense
mound.example: Ziri walked around the mound and found a wooden cross on it.
mound.exampleZh: 茲裡繞著土丘走了一圈，發現上面有一個木製十字架。

nemesis.example: Batman is in constant conflict with his nemesis, The Joker.
nemesis.exampleZh: 蝙蝠俠與他的宿敵小丑不斷發生衝突。

rocker.definition: A curved piece of wood attached to the bottom of a rocking chair or cradle that enables it to rock back and forth.
rocker.example: All modern surfboards share a similar rocker design — Bruce Jones https//web.archive.org/web/20051212041317/http://www.brucejones.com/longboar.htm
rocker.exampleZh: 所有現代衝浪板都具有相似的搖桿設計 - Bruce Jones https://web.archive.org/web/20051212041317/http://www.brucejones.com/longboar.htm

whiff.definition: A waft; a brief, gentle breeze; a light gust of air
whiff.example: I think I've gotten a whiff of coffee: quick, off to the kitchen!
whiff.exampleZh: 我想我聞到了一股咖啡的香味：快去廚房吧！

somber.definition: To make sombre or dark; to make shady.
somber.example: Even in Tom's funniest sketches, there is a somber note.
somber.exampleZh: 即使在湯姆最有趣的草圖中，也有一個憂鬱的音符。

mutation.example: Gustavo wanted to avoid the mutation.
mutation.exampleZh: 古斯塔沃想要避免這種突變。

assailant.definition: Someone who attacks or assails another violently, or criminally.

biopsy.definition: The removal and examination of a sample of tissue, cells, or bodily fluid from a living body for diagnostic purposes.
biopsy.example: We will need to perform a biopsy to determine whether the tumour is malignant or benign.
biopsy.exampleZh: 我們需要進行活檢以確定腫瘤是惡性還是良性。

straightaway.example: Collective rules are not set straightaway but progressively win recognition.
straightaway.exampleZh: 集體規則不是直接製定的​​，而是逐步贏得認可的。

reclaim.definition: The calling back of a hawk.
reclaim.example: Reclaim your surplus value: steal from work!
reclaim.exampleZh: 收回你的剩餘價值：從工作中偷竊！

funnier.example: The angrier you get, the funnier you look.
funnier.exampleZh: 你越生氣，你看起來就越有趣。

felon.definition: A person who has committed a felony.
felon.example: I know that Tom is a convicted felon.
felon.exampleZh: 我知道湯姆是一名被定罪的重罪犯。

passive.example: He remained passive during the protest.
passive.exampleZh: 他在抗議期間保持被動。

stallion.example: The magnificent stallion fetched a huge price at auction.
stallion.exampleZh: 這匹雄偉的種馬在拍賣會上拍出了天價。

blackjack.definition: A common gambling card game in casinos, where the object is to get as close to 21 without going over.
blackjack.example: They played a short round of blackjack before leaving the casino.
blackjack.exampleZh: 他們在離開賭場之前玩了一小輪二十一點。

pushy.definition: Aggressively ambitious; overly assertive, bold or determined.
pushy.example: Parents are ruining school sports days by being pushy and overbearing, a survey suggests. BBC
pushy.exampleZh: 一項調查顯示，家長們因咄咄逼人和專橫而毀掉了學校的運動會。英國廣播公司

macaroni.definition: A type of pasta in the form of short tubes; sometimes loosely, pasta in general.
macaroni.example: Cover the macaroni completely with water.

bulldog.definition: A breed of dog developed in England by the crossing of the bullbaiting dog and the Pug to produce a ladies companion dog. Having a very smooth coat, a flattened face, wrinkly cheeks, powerful front legs and smaller hind legs.
bulldog.example: This bulldog is happy. The other one isn't.
bulldog.exampleZh: 這隻鬥牛犬很高興。另一個則不然。

rigid.definition: A bicycle with no suspension system.
rigid.example: The deceased was rigid and livid.
rigid.exampleZh: 死者表情僵硬，臉色鐵青。

maxim.definition: A self-evident axiom or premise; a pithy expression of a general principle or rule.

reduction.definition: The act, process, or result of reducing.

frontal.definition: The bone at the front of the skull, behind the forehead.

empathy.definition: Identification with or understanding of the thoughts, feelings, or emotional state of another person.
empathy.example: She had a lot of empathy for her neighbor; she knew what it was like to lose a parent too.
empathy.exampleZh: 她對鄰居充滿同情心。她也知道失去父母是什麼感覺。

undermine.definition: To dig underneath (something), to make a passage for destructive or military purposes; to sap.
undermine.exampleZh: 這可能會破壞阿爾及利亞的穩定。

overload.exampleZh: 透過漸進式超負荷挑戰自己。

detection.definition: The act of detecting or sensing something; discovering something that was hidden or disguised.
detection.exampleZh: 薩米冒著被發現的危險。

culinary.definition: Relating to the practice of cookery or the activity of cooking.

unharmed.definition: Which has not suffered harm; which has not been injured or damaged

boils.definition: A localized accumulation of pus in the skin, resulting from infection.

giddy.example: The man became giddy upon standing up so fast.
giddy.exampleZh: 男人站起來的速度如此之快，頓時頭暈目眩。

nonstop.definition: (travel) A nonstop journey, especially a nonstop flight.
nonstop.example: There's a nonstop flight to Mauritius, but I'm not sitting on the same plane for thirteen hours.
nonstop.exampleZh: 有直飛毛里求斯的航班，但我不會在同一架飛機上坐十三個小時。

mahjong.definition: A game (originally Chinese) for four players, using a collection of tiles divided into five or six suits.
mahjong.example: Mahjong is a game four people play.
mahjong.exampleZh: 麻將是四個人玩的遊戲。

ramen.definition: Soup noodles of wheat, with various ingredients (Japanese style)
ramen.exampleZh: 我們吃了一些很棒的拉麵。

goodman.example: Amy Goodman is a courageous woman.
goodman.exampleZh: 艾米·古德曼是一位勇敢的女性。

slutty.example: The makeup, high heels and short skirt made her look so slutty.
slutty.exampleZh: 妝容、高跟鞋和短裙讓她看起來很放蕩。

gunner.definition: Artillery soldier, or such who holds private rank. Abbreviated Gnr.
gunner.example: Tim's uncle was a machine gunner on a helicopter in Vietnam.
gunner.exampleZh: 提姆的叔叔是越南一架直升機上的機槍手。

sleepover.definition: The act of spending the night as a guest in another's house, especially when the participants are children.
sleepover.example: Carlos had a sleepover for his birthday.
sleepover.exampleZh: 卡洛斯生日那天在外過夜。

werewolves.definition: A person who is transformed or can transform into a wolf or a wolflike human, often said to transform during a full moon.
werewolves.example: Tonight belongs to the fireflies and the bats—and the werewolves.
werewolves.exampleZh: 今晚屬於螢火蟲和蝙蝠——還有狼人。

catalog.definition: A systematic list of names, books, pictures etc.
catalog.example: Ziri carefully studied the auction catalog.
catalog.exampleZh: 紫日仔細研究了拍賣圖錄。

paranormal.definition: A person to whom paranormal powers are attributed.
paranormal.exampleZh: 卡爾開始經歷超自然現象。

biker.definition: A person whose lifestyle is centered on motorcycles, sometimes a member of a motorcycle club.
biker.example: This track is a challenge for any mountain biker.
biker.exampleZh: 這條賽道對任何山地自行車手來說都是一個挑戰。

jellyfish.definition: An almost transparent aquatic animal; any one of the acalephs, especially one of the larger species, having a jellylike appearance.

municipal.definition: A financial instrument issued by a municipality.
municipal.example: Behind that building is the municipal pool.
municipal.exampleZh: 建築後面是市政游泳池。

ruckus.example: The leopard was making a huge ruckus.
ruckus.exampleZh: 豹子發出了巨大的騷動。

proximity.definition: Closeness; the state of being near as in space, time, or relationship.
proximity.example: The proximity of the heat source allowed it to be detected by the sensor.
proximity.exampleZh: 熱源的接近使得感測器能夠檢測到它。

commune.definition: A small community, often rural, whose members share in the ownership of property, and in the division of labour; the members of such a community.
commune.example: The commune distributed the food fairly.

unavailable.definition: (history) A communist who operated underground and was therefore not available for a political leadership position.
unavailable.example: A cold, reserved man, he was seen as emotionally unavailable.
unavailable.exampleZh: 他是一個冷漠、矜持的人，被認為在感情上難以相處。

trooper.definition: A soldier of private rank in cavalry or armour.
trooper.example: He was a real trooper about taking care of the kids for the weekend.
trooper.exampleZh: 他是一個真正的士兵，在周末照顧孩子們。

granite.definition: A group of igneous and plutonic rocks composed primarily of feldspar and quartz. Usually contains one or more dark minerals, which may be mica, pyroxene, or amphibole. Granite is quarried for building stone, road gravel, decorative stone, and tombstones. Common colors are gray, white, pink, and yellow-brown.
granite.example: Many monuments are crafted from beautiful, marbled granite.
granite.exampleZh: 許多紀念碑都是用美麗的大理石花崗岩製成的。

infrastructure.definition: (systems theory) An underlying base or foundation especially for an organization or system.
infrastructure.example: The parasitic tyranny's infrastructure depends on secrecy in order to be effective.
infrastructure.exampleZh: 寄生暴政的基礎設施依賴保密才能發揮作用。

defenseless.definition: Lacking any form of defense; vulnerable; open to attack.
defenseless.exampleZh: 湯姆感到完全毫無防備。

barrow.example: There are tall menhirs at Egil's barrow.
barrow.exampleZh: 埃吉爾的手推車上有高大的紀念碑。

bertha.definition: A lace collar that covers the shoulders of a dress
bertha.example: Bertha Pappenheim described psychoanalysis as "the talking cure".
bertha.exampleZh: 伯莎·帕彭海姆 (Bertha Pappenheim) 將精神分析描述為「談話療法」。

proctor.definition: A person who supervises students as they take an examination, in the United States at the college/university level; often the department secretary, or a fellow/graduate student; an invigilator.
proctor.example: The proctor walked slowly up and down the aisles during the examination.
proctor.exampleZh: 考試期間，監考官在走道上緩慢地走來走去。

feminist.definition: An advocate of feminism; a person who believes in bringing about the equality of the sexes (of women and men) in all aspects of public and private life
feminist.exampleZh: 瑪麗亞是一位女權主義者。

crazier.definition: Flawed or damaged; unsound, liable to break apart; ramshackle.
crazier.example: Sami's pranks got crazier and crazier.
crazier.exampleZh: 薩米的惡作劇變得越來越瘋狂。

bulbs.definition: Any solid object rounded at one end and tapering on the other, possibly attached to a larger object at the tapered end.

rabies.definition: An infectious disease caused by species of Lyssavirus that causes acute encephalitis in warm-blooded animals and people, characterised by abnormal behaviour such as biting, excitement, aggressiveness, and dementia, followed by paralysis and death.
rabies.example: We are vaccinating you against rabies.
rabies.exampleZh: 我們正在為您接種狂犬病疫苗。

chastity.definition: The quality of being chaste: the state of abstaining from any sexual activity considered immoral; avoidance of sexual sins.
chastity.example: Her chastity belt set off the metal detector at the airport.
chastity.exampleZh: 她的貞操帶引爆了機場的金屬探測器。

hoops.definition: A circular band of metal used to bind a barrel.
hoops.example: Fadil made Layla jump through hoops.
hoops.exampleZh: 法迪爾讓萊拉跳進了鐵圈。

baptist.example: Christians identify John the Baptist with the prophet Elijah.
baptist.exampleZh: 基督徒認為施洗約翰就是先知以利亞。

diabetic.definition: A person who suffers from diabetes mellitus.

glacier.definition: A large body of ice which flows under its own mass, usually downhill.
glacier.example: They warned that the effects of glacier melting on water resources are becoming “increasingly serious” for China.
glacier.exampleZh: 他們警告說，冰川融化對中國水資源的影響正變得「越來越嚴重」。

rehabilitation.definition: The process of rehabilitating somebody or something.
rehabilitation.example: Prisons are euphemistically called rehabilitation centers.
rehabilitation.exampleZh: 監獄被委婉地稱為康復中心。

unborn.definition: A single unborn offspring at any stage of gestation.
unborn.example: Inheritance law allows property to be left to the unborn.
unborn.exampleZh: 繼承法允許將財產留給未出生的人。

footprint.definition: The impression of the foot in a soft substance such as sand or snow.
footprint.example: This computer has a smaller footprint.
footprint.exampleZh: 這台計算機的佔地面積較小。

garment.example: Algeria needs to develop its garment industry.
garment.exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞需要發展其服裝業。

plight.example: The documentary is meant to raise consciousness about the plight of the poor.
plight.exampleZh: 這部紀錄片旨在提高人們對窮人困境的認識。

preference.definition: The selection of one thing or person over others (with the main adposition being "for" in relation to the thing or person, but possibly also "of")
preference.example: He has a preference for crisp wines.

rapping.definition: To strike something sharply with one's knuckles; knock.

dodgy.example: Asked why, a spokesman gave a dodgy answer about legal ramifications.
dodgy.exampleZh: 當被問及原因時，一位發言人對法律後果給了一個狡猾的答案。

backbone.definition: The series of vertebrae, separated by disks, that encloses and protects the spinal cord, and runs down the middle of the back in vertebrate animals.
backbone.example: Before automobiles, railroads were a backbone of commerce.
backbone.exampleZh: 在汽車出現之前，鐵路是商業的支柱。

mirage.definition: An optical phenomenon in which light is refracted through a layer of hot air close to the ground, giving the appearance of there being refuge in the distance.
mirage.example: What's the difference between a mirage and a hallucination?
mirage.exampleZh: 海市蜃樓和幻覺有什麼差別？

virtuous.definition: Full of virtue, having excellent moral character.
virtuous.example: Successful communities need strong, selfless leaders and a virtuous people.
virtuous.exampleZh: 成功的社區需要強大、無私的領導者和有道德的人民。

grizzly.exampleZh: 霰彈槍射殺衝鋒的灰熊！

earns.definition: To gain (success, reward, recognition) through applied effort or work.

oblivion.definition: The state of forgetting completely, of being oblivious, unconscious, unaware, as when sleeping, drunk, or dead.
oblivion.example: He regularly drank himself into oblivion.

brethren.definition: Of or akin to; related; like
brethren.example: And though he knew his brethren, he was not known by them.
brethren.exampleZh: 儘管他認識他的弟兄，但他們卻不認識他。

bookie.definition: A bookmaker, being a person who, or business which, takes bets from the general public on sporting events and similar.

amnesty.definition: Forgetfulness; cessation of remembrance of wrong; oblivion.
amnesty.example: War criminals should not benefit from amnesty or impunity.
amnesty.exampleZh: 戰犯不應受益於特赦或有罪不罰。

friction.definition: The rubbing of one object or surface against another.
friction.example: The friction between the Americans and the British mounted.
friction.exampleZh: 美國人和英國人之間的摩擦不斷加劇。

wacky.example: Remember "Wacky Races"? Watch the US primary, it's its spitting image!
wacky.exampleZh: 還記得「古怪的賽車」嗎？看看美國初選，簡直就是一模一樣！

swung.definition: To rotate about an off-centre fixed point.
swung.example: The plant swung in the breeze.

adieu.definition: A farewell, a goodbye; especially a fond farewell, or a lasting or permanent farewell.
adieu.example: With a shrug and some sorrow, Europeans bid 'Adieu' to EU member Britain.
adieu.exampleZh: 歐洲人聳聳肩，帶著些許悲傷，向歐盟成員國英國說「再見」。

unhealthy.definition: Characterized by, or conducive to poor health
unhealthy.example: The villagers lived in unhealthy surroundings.

prestigious.example: She has a prestigious job with an international organization.
prestigious.exampleZh: 她在國際組織中擁有一份享有盛譽的工作。

pathologist.definition: An expert in pathology; a specialist who examines samples of body tissues for diagnostic or forensic purpose.
pathologist.exampleZh: 湯姆是一名法醫病理學家。

concubine.definition: A sexual partner, especially a woman, to whom one is not or cannot be married.

bugle.example: Tom played Reveille on his bugle every morning.
bugle.exampleZh: 湯姆每天早上都會​​用號角吹起床號。

humanitarian.definition: A scholar of one of the subjects in the humanities.
humanitarian.example: Is the humanitarian mission facing challenges?

sleepless.definition: Characterized by an absence of sleep.
sleepless.example: I spent a sleepless night worrying about the exams.

gurney.example: Paramedics were carrying James on a gurney.
gurney.exampleZh: 醫護人員用輪床上抬著詹姆斯。

calcium.definition: The chemical element (Symbol Ca), with an atomic number 20. It is a soft, silvery-white alkaline earth metal which occurs naturally as carbonate in limestone and as silicate in many rocks.
calcium.example: Calcium is an essential mineral for the human body.
calcium.exampleZh: 鈣是人體必需的礦物質。

frown.definition: A facial expression in which the eyebrows are brought together, and the forehead is wrinkled, usually indicating displeasure, sadness or worry, or less often confusion or concentration.

deranged.definition: (chiefly passive) To cause (someone) to go insane or become deranged.

discomfort.example: Ziri needs to become comfortable with discomfort.

kosher.definition: To kasher; to prepare (for example, meat) in conformity with the requirements of the Jewish law.
kosher.example: David's mother kept a kosher kitchen, with separate sets of dishes for meat and for dairy.
kosher.exampleZh: 大衛的母親擁有一間符合猶太潔食標準的廚房，裡面有單獨的肉類和乳製品餐具。

technological.definition: Of, relating to, or involving technology, especially modern scientific technology.

lacked.definition: To be without, to need, to require.

drinker.definition: Agent noun of drink; someone or something that drinks.

hotshot.definition: Someone with exceptional skills in a certain field.
hotshot.example: She sure was a hotshot on the keyboard, 93 words per minute!
hotshot.exampleZh: 她確實是鍵盤高手，每分鐘93個字！

unauthorized.example: I don't want unauthorized pictures of me on people's social media.
unauthorized.exampleZh: 我不想讓未經授權的我的照片出現在人們的社交媒體上。

myrtle.definition: An evergreen shrub or small tree of the genus Myrtus, native to southern Europe and north Africa.
myrtle.example: Mushrooms, strawberries, myrtle trees and so on come from the woods.
myrtle.exampleZh: 蘑菇、草莓、桃金孃樹等都來自樹林。

placement.definition: The act of placing or putting in place; the act of locating or positioning; the state of being placed.
placement.example: It seems to me that the placement of that poster could be better.
placement.exampleZh: 在我看來，那張海報的位置可能會更好。

sordid.example: Live can so easily degenerate into something sordid and vulgar.
sordid.exampleZh: 生活很容易就墮落成骯髒、庸俗的東西。

plateau.definition: A largely level expanse of land at a high elevation; tableland.
plateau.example: The panting breathless climbers were on the edge of the plateau.
plateau.exampleZh: 氣喘吁籲的登山者已經到了高原的邊緣。

quota.definition: A proportional part or share; the share or proportion assigned to each in a division.
quota.example: We almost broke our necks trying to meet the quota.
quota.exampleZh: 為了達到目標，我們差點摔斷脖子

tuning.definition: To adjust (a musical instrument) so that it produces the correct pitches.

hormone.definition: Any substance produced by one tissue and conveyed by the bloodstream to another to effect physiological activity.
hormone.exampleZh: 黃體酮是一種女性荷爾蒙。

apparatus.definition: The entirety of means whereby a specific production is made existent or task accomplished.
apparatus.example: The fire department dispatched several fire apparatus to the scene.
apparatus.exampleZh: 消防局出動多輛消防車趕赴現場。

gringo.definition: A white person from an English-speaking country, particularly the United States.
gringo.example: On a scale of "gringo" to "mero mero sabor ranchero", how good is my Spanish?
gringo.exampleZh: 從“gringo”到“mero mero sabor ranchero”，我的西班牙語有多好？

samaritan.example: Tom was rescued by a Good Samaritan.

catalogue.definition: A systematic list of names, books, pictures etc.
catalogue.example: Could you send me your last catalogue, please?
catalogue.exampleZh: 你能把你最後的目錄寄給我嗎？

luckiest.definition: (of people) Favoured by luck; fortunate; having good success or good fortune
luckiest.example: Tom felt like the luckiest man on earth.
luckiest.exampleZh: 湯姆覺得自己是世界上最幸運的人。

vending.definition: To hawk or to peddle merchandise.
vending.example: I bought chocolate from the vending machine.
vending.exampleZh: 我從自動販賣機買了巧克力。

housewives.definition: (plural "housewives") A woman whose main employment is homemaking, maintaining the upkeep of her home and tending to household affairs; often, such a woman whose sole [unpaid] employment is homemaking.
housewives.example: Washing machines spare housewives a lot of trouble.
housewives.exampleZh: 洗衣機給家庭主婦免除了很多麻煩。

fellowship.definition: A company of people that share the same interest or aim.

beverage.definition: A liquid to consume; a drink, such as tea, coffee, liquor, beer, milk, juice, or soft drinks, usually excluding water.

unfit.definition: To make unfit; to render unsuitable, spoil, disqualify.
unfit.example: Jack cannot run, making him unfit for the track team.
unfit.exampleZh: 傑克不能跑步，這使他不適合參加田徑隊。

tidal.example: The tidal barrier and flood walls need to be reinforced.
tidal.exampleZh: 防潮堤和防洪牆需要加固。

fetus.definition: An unborn or unhatched vertebrate showing signs of the mature animal.
fetus.example: Gustavo gave the fetus a proper burial.
fetus.exampleZh: 古斯塔沃為胎兒進行了妥善的埋葬。

entrust.definition: To trust to the care of.
entrust.example: Can I entrust you with a secret?
entrust.exampleZh: 我可以託付你一個秘密嗎？

oversight.definition: An omission; something that is left out, missed or forgotten.
oversight.example: A small oversight at this stage can lead to big problems later.
oversight.exampleZh: 這個階段的一個小疏忽可能會導致以後出現大問題。

lanes.definition: (used in street names) A road, street, or similar thoroughfare.
lanes.exampleZh: 湯姆在沒有打信號燈的情況下改變了車道。

vacate.definition: To move out of a dwelling, either by choice or by eviction.
vacate.example: I have to vacate my house by midday, as the new owner is moving in.
vacate.exampleZh: 由於新主人要搬進來，我必須在中午前搬出房子。

socialism.definition: Any of various economic and political theories advocating collective or governmental ownership and administration of the means of production and distribution of goods.
socialism.exampleZh: 社會主義還是野蠻主義。

prosperous.example: Trading Babe Ruth was far more prosperous for the Yankees than for the Red Sox.
prosperous.exampleZh: 交易貝比魯斯對洋基隊來說比對紅襪隊來說要繁榮得多。

reflex.definition: An automatic response to a simple stimulus which does not require mental processing.
reflex.exampleZh: 我已經失去了所有的嘔吐反射。

roadblock.definition: Something that blocks or obstructs a road.
roadblock.example: Bruno complained to Rima about the roadblock.
roadblock.exampleZh: 布魯諾向裡瑪抱怨路障。

inquisition.definition: An investigation or inquiry into the truth of some matter
inquisition.exampleZh: 沒有人期待葡萄牙宗教裁判所。

prefect.definition: An official of Ancient Rome who controlled or superintended a particular command, charge, department, etc.
prefect.example: the prefect of the aqueducts; the prefect of a camp, of a fleet, of the city guard, or of provisions; the pretorian prefect, who was commander of the troops guarding the emperor's person
prefect.exampleZh: 渡槽主管；營、艦隊、城市守衛或糧食的長官；禁衛軍太守，護衛皇帝的軍隊統帥

paparazzi.example: The paparazzi hounded the young actor wherever he went.
paparazzi.exampleZh: 這位年輕演員所到之處，狗仔隊都對其進行追捕。

eater.exampleZh: 我是一個情緒化的食客。

discrimination.definition: Discernment, the act of discriminating, discerning, distinguishing, noting or perceiving differences between things, with intent to understand rightly and make correct decisions.

publication.definition: The act of publishing printed or other matter.

rowdy.example: He sat stuck between a rowdy elderly couple on the aeroplane.
rowdy.exampleZh: 飛機上，他坐在一對吵鬧的老夫婦中間。

outpost.definition: A military post stationed at a distance from the main body of troops.
outpost.example: The outpost did not have enough ammunition to resist a determined assault.
outpost.exampleZh: 前哨沒有足夠的彈藥來抵抗堅決的攻擊。

inscription.example: The facsimile proved that the inscription was genuine.

snuff.definition: Finely ground or pulverized tobacco intended for use by being sniffed or snorted into the nose.
snuff.example: No matter how ruthless you are, you'll never snuff out all your enemies.
snuff.exampleZh: 無論你多麼殘忍，你永遠無法消滅所有的敵人。

purgatory.example: There is no hell or heaven, we are in the purgatory already.
purgatory.exampleZh: 沒有地獄或天堂，我們已經在煉獄了。

showcase.definition: A case for displaying merchandise or valuable items.
showcase.example: Yanni likes conversations that showcase his personality.
showcase.exampleZh: 雅尼喜歡能展現他個性的對話。

moisture.definition: That which moistens or makes damp or wet; exuding fluid; liquid in small quantity.

replica.example: The statue on the museum floor is an authentic replica.
replica.exampleZh: 博物館地板上的雕像是真實的複製品。

lefty.example: I'll bet my lefty he won't show up for work today.
lefty.exampleZh: 我敢打賭我的左撇子他今天不會來上班。

wondrous.example: We all stared open-mouthed at the wondrous sight.
wondrous.exampleZh: 我們都目瞪口呆地看著這奇妙的景象。

disagreement.example: They had a bit of a disagreement about what color to paint the bedroom, but they have reached a compromise.
disagreement.exampleZh: 他們對於臥室粉刷什麼顏色存在一些分歧，但他們已經達成了妥協。

horoscope.definition: The position of the planets and stars at the moment of someone's birth; a diagram of such positions.
horoscope.example: Mary is still reading her horoscope.
horoscope.exampleZh: 瑪麗仍在看她的星座運勢。

morbid.example: James found morbid sculptures in the basement.
morbid.exampleZh: 詹姆斯在地下室發現了病態的雕塑。

misguided.example: A misguided child may use his personal power in mischievous ways
misguided.exampleZh: 被誤導的孩子可能會以惡作劇的方式使用他的個人力量

initiation.definition: The act of initiating, or the process of being initiated or introduced

commodore.definition: A naval officer holding a rank between captain and rear admiral.
commodore.example: The Texas Instruments TI-99/4A mainly competed with the Commodore VIC-20.
commodore.exampleZh: 德州儀器 TI-99/4A 主要與 Commodore VIC-20 競爭。

nectar.example: Hummingbirds drink the sweet nectar from certain flowers.
nectar.exampleZh: 蜂鳥喝某些花朵的甜美花蜜。

swarm.definition: A large number of insects, especially when in motion or (for bees) migrating to a new colony.

judicial.definition: That branch of government which is responsible for maintaining the courts of law and for the administration of justice.
judicial.example: Maltese is used in legal and judicial proceedings in Malta.
judicial.exampleZh: 馬耳他的法律和司法程序使用馬耳他語。

drumming.definition: The act of beating a drum.

shithole.definition: A very dirty or unpleasant place.
shithole.example: Ahmad originally comes from some shithole of a country.
shithole.exampleZh: 艾哈邁德原本來自一個國家的某個爛地方。

density.definition: A measure of the mass of matter contained by a unit volume.
density.example: The number of particles per unit volume of a specified volume can be considered to be the particle density for the specified volume.
density.exampleZh: 指定體積的每單位體積的顆粒數可以被認為是指定體積的顆粒密度。

rowan.example: The reddish-orange berries of the rowan can be used to make jam.
rowan.exampleZh: 羅文的紅橙色漿果可以用來製作果醬。

garth.definition: A grassy quadrangle surrounded by cloisters

stalk.definition: The stem or main axis of a plant, which supports the seed-carrying parts.
stalk.example: a stalk of wheat, rye, or oats;  the stalks of maize or hemp
stalk.exampleZh: 小麥、黑麥或燕麥的莖；  玉米或大麻的莖

fours.definition: The digit or figure 4; an occurrence thereof.
fours.example: Do you have any more fours? I want to make this a little taller.
fours.exampleZh: 你還有四更嗎？我想讓這個高一點。

righteousness.definition: The quality or state of being righteous.
righteousness.example: I will I could bottle your righteousness.
righteousness.exampleZh: 我願意將你的正義裝進瓶子裡。

masturbate.definition: To stimulate oneself sexually, especially by use of one’s hand or a sex toy made for this purpose, often to the point of ejaculation.
masturbate.example: I find this difficult to masturbate to.

wiener.definition: A sausage made from beef, chicken or pork.
wiener.example: Wiener sausages are called Frankfurter sausages in Vienna.
wiener.exampleZh: 維納香腸在維也納被稱為法蘭克福香腸。

painless.definition: Free from pain; without pain or trouble.
painless.example: The uroscan is a painless procedure.
painless.exampleZh: 尿路掃描是一種無痛手術。

obligated.definition: To bind, compel, constrain, or oblige by a social, legal, or moral tie.

repulsive.definition: Tending to rouse aversion or to repulse

definitive.definition: (grammar) a word, such as a definite article or demonstrative pronoun, that defines or limits something

billboard.definition: A very large outdoor sign, generally used for advertising.
billboard.example: I recognized Tom from the billboard.
billboard.exampleZh: 我從廣告看板上認出了湯姆。

imitate.definition: To follow as a model or a pattern; to make a copy, counterpart or semblance of.

waved.definition: To relinquish (a right etc.); to give up claim to; to forego.

setback.definition: An obstacle, delay, disadvantage, blow (an adverse event which retards or prevents progress towards a desired outcome)
setback.exampleZh: 一次挫折阻礙了我們的進步。

clockwork.definition: A mechanism powered by a coiled spring and regulated by some form of escapement; the power is transmitted through toothed gearwheels and used to drive a mechanical clock, toy, or other device.
clockwork.example: The public transport system runs like clockwork.
clockwork.exampleZh: 大眾運輸系統運作得像發條一樣。

brawl.definition: A disorderly argument or fight, usually with a large number of people involved.
brawl.example: The meeting degenerated into a vicious brawl.
brawl.exampleZh: 會議演變成了一場惡毒的鬥毆。

disable.definition: To render unable; to take away an ability of, as by crippling.
disable.exampleZh: 停用基於密碼的身份驗證。

sexist.definition: A person who discriminates on grounds of sex; someone who practises sexism.
sexist.example: Skura thinks Yanni is a sexist.
sexist.exampleZh: 斯庫拉認為雅尼是性別歧視者。

reproduce.definition: To produce an image or copy of.
reproduce.example: Western attitudes towards "authenticity" often reproduce stereotypes.
reproduce.exampleZh: 西方對「真實性」的態度常常再現刻板印象。

potty.definition: To go and use the potty: to leave in order to urinate or defecate.

blueberry.definition: An edible round berry, belonging to the cowberry group (Vaccinium sect. Cyanococcus), with flared crowns at the end, that turns blue on ripening.

horizontal.definition: A horizontal component of a structure
horizontal.example: 1667: As when the Sun new ris'n / Looks through the Horizontal misty Air — John Milton, Paradise Lost, Book 1, ll. 594-5
horizontal.exampleZh: 1667 年：當太陽新升起/透過水平薄霧的空氣時 — 約翰·彌爾頓，《失樂園》，第 1 冊，ll。 594-5

geometry.definition: The branch of mathematics dealing with spatial relationships.
geometry.example: He did geometry exercises after school.

dumbest.definition: Unable to speak; lacking power of speech (kept in "deaf, dumb, and blind").
dumbest.example: The dumbest questions are those, that I cannot answer.
dumbest.exampleZh: 最愚蠢的問題是那些我無法回答的問題。

fertilizer.definition: A natural substance that is used to make the ground more suitable for growing plants.
fertilizer.exampleZh: 阿爾及利亞有化肥公司。

supervise.definition: To oversee or direct a task or organization.
supervise.example: Without someone to supervise them, the group will lack direction.
supervise.exampleZh: 如果沒有人監督，團隊就會缺乏方向。

techno.definition: A repetitive style of music originally produced for use in a continuous DJ set. The central rhythmic component is most often in common time (4/4), where time is marked with a bass drum on each quarter note pulse, a backbeat played by snare or clap on the second and fourth pulses of the bar, and an open hi-hat sounding every second eighth note.
techno.example: What's the difference between trance, house, and techno music?
techno.exampleZh: trance、house 和 techno 音樂有什麼不同？

evident.example: It was evident she was angry, after she slammed the door.
evident.exampleZh: 關上門後，看得出來她很生氣。

helium.definition: The second lightest chemical element (symbol He) with an atomic number of 2 and atomic weight of 4.002602, a colorless, odorless and inert noble gas.
helium.example: Uranus' atmosphere is made up of hydrogen, helium, and methane.
helium.exampleZh: 天王星的大氣層由氫、氦和甲烷組成。

skank.definition: A lewd and disreputable person, often female, especially an unattractive person with an air of tawdry promiscuity.

coastal.definition: Relating to the coast; on or near the coast, as a coastal town, a coastal breeze
coastal.example: Coastal regions generally have milder climates.
coastal.exampleZh: 沿海地區氣候普遍較為溫和。

sensual.example: That massage was a very sensual experience!
sensual.exampleZh: 那次按摩是非常感官的體驗！

matrimony.definition: Marriage; the state of being married.
matrimony.example: Matrimony is the attempt of a couple to solve problems they would never have had as singles.
matrimony.exampleZh: 婚姻是一對夫婦嘗試解決單身時永遠不會遇到的問題的嘗試。

feeble.example: Though she appeared old and feeble, she could still throw a ball.
feeble.exampleZh: 儘管她看上去年老體弱，但她仍然可以扔球。

airfield.definition: An open field designated for the taking off and landing of aircraft, but which, unlike an airport, does not necessarily have terminals or paved runways.
airfield.example: The airfield on the island is now covered with weeds.
airfield.exampleZh: 島上的機場現在已長滿雜草。

tombs.definition: A small building (or "vault") for the remains of the dead, with walls, a roof, and (if it is to be used for more than one corpse) a door. It may be partly or wholly in the ground (except for its entrance) in a cemetery, or it may be inside a church proper or in its crypt. Single tombs may be permanently sealed; those for families (or other groups) have doors for access whenever needed.

potassium.definition: A soft, waxy, silvery reactive metal that is never found unbound in nature; an element (symbol K) with an atomic number of 19 and atomic weight of 39.0983. The symbol is derived from the Latin kalium.
potassium.example: Berries are rich in minerals such as potassium.

homage.definition: A demonstration of respect, such as towards an individual after their retirement or death
homage.example: The American director made an homage to spaghetti western films.
homage.exampleZh: 這位美國導演向義大利式西部片致敬。

devious.definition: Cunning or deceiving, not straightforward or honest, not frank

crimson.example: Ladybugs are beetles that like crimson clover and hairy vetch.
crimson.exampleZh: 瓢蟲是喜歡深紅色三葉草和毛野豌豆的甲蟲。

activist.definition: One who is politically active in the role of a citizen; especially, one who campaigns for change.
activist.exampleZh: 湯姆是一位環保活動家。

rowing.definition: To propel (a boat or other craft) over water using oars.

conditioner.definition: Anything that improves the condition of something

filmmaker.definition: A producer or director of films/movies.
filmmaker.example: Tom, you're a very talented filmmaker.
filmmaker.exampleZh: 湯姆，你是一位非常有才華的電影製片人。

perjury.definition: The deliberate giving of false or misleading testimony under oath.
perjury.example: We declare under penalty of perjury that the foregoing is true and correct.
perjury.exampleZh: 我們聲明上述內容真實且正確，如有偽證，願受處罰。

softball.definition: A game similar to baseball but played with a larger and softer ball which can be thrown overhand or underhand.
softball.example: In softball, the ball is pitched underhanded.
softball.exampleZh: 在壘球比賽中，球是用低手投球的。

etiquette.definition: The forms required by a good upbringing, or prescribed by authority, to be observed in social or official life; observance of the proprieties of rank and occasion; conventional decorum; ceremonial code of polite society.
etiquette.example: How do you adapt to different cultural norms and etiquette?
etiquette.exampleZh: 您如何適應不同的文化規範和禮儀？

joyous.example: May happiness and joy come to you as you celebrate this joyous day.
joyous.exampleZh: 當您慶祝這個歡樂的日子時，願幸福和快樂降臨到您身上。

residential.definition: A trip during which people temporarily live together.
residential.example: Gabriel lived in a standard residential street.
residential.exampleZh: 加百列住在一條標準的住宅街道上。

unjust.exampleZh: 這個解決方案是非常不公平的。

fetish.definition: Something which is believed to possess, contain, or cause spiritual or magical powers; an amulet or a talisman.
fetish.example: I know a guy who has a foot fetish.
fetish.exampleZh: 我認識一個有戀足癖的人。

tortoise.definition: Any of various land-dwelling reptiles, of the family Testudinidae or the order Testudines , whose body is enclosed in a shell (carapace plus plastron). The animal can withdraw its head and four legs partially into the shell, providing some protection from predators.

davenport.definition: A large sofa, especially a formal one.
davenport.example: Tom curled up on the davenport.
davenport.exampleZh: 湯姆蜷縮在達文波特上。

heartbreak.definition: Overwhelming mental anguish or grief, especially that caused by loss or disappointment

safari.definition: A trip into any undeveloped area to see, photograph or hunt wild animals in their own environment.
safari.example: Tom and Mary went on an African safari.
safari.exampleZh: 湯姆和瑪麗去非洲探險。

limousine.definition: An automobile body with seats and permanent top like a coupe, and with the top projecting over the driver and a projecting front.
limousine.example: A heavy security detail escorted the presidential limousine.

magnitude.definition: The absolute or relative size, extent or importance of something.
magnitude.example: The earthquake was very severe, with a magnitude of 5.2.
magnitude.exampleZh: 這次地震非常嚴重，震級為5.2級。

coupon.definition: A section of a ticket, showing the holder to be entitled to some specified accommodation or service, as to a passage over a designated line of travel, a particular seat in a theater, a discount, etc.

snore.definition: The act of snoring, and the noise produced.

prescribe.definition: To order (a drug or medical device) for use by a particular patient (under licensed authority).

likeness.definition: The state or quality of being like or alike
likeness.example: A foe in the likeness of a friend

interface.definition: The point of interconnection or contact between entities.
interface.example: Public relations firms often serve as the interface between a company and the press.
interface.exampleZh: 公共關係公司通常充當公司和媒體之間的橋樑。

sluts.definition: A sexually promiscuous woman or girl.

auxiliary.definition: A person or group that acts in an auxiliary manner.

swipe.definition: A quick grab, bat, or other motion with the hand or paw; a sweep.
swipe.example: Take a swipe at the answer, even if you're not sure.
swipe.exampleZh: 即使您不確定，也可以輕掃一下答案。

longed.definition: To take a long position in.
longed.example: She longed for him to come back.

livelihood.definition: A means of providing the necessities of life for oneself (for example, a job or income).
livelihood.example: an independent livelihood; to make / earn / gain a good livelihood
livelihood.exampleZh: 獨立的生計；使/賺取/獲得良好的生計

swordsman.definition: A person skilled at using swords in sport or combat; a fencer.

resourceful.definition: Capable or clever; able to put available resources to efficient or ingenious use; using materials at hand wisely or efficiently.
resourceful.example: With a resourceful use of space and a fresh coat of paint, the room became a pleasant library with a comfortable seating area.
resourceful.exampleZh: 透過對空間的充分利用和新鮮的油漆，房間變成了一個令人愉快的圖書館，並設有舒適的休息區。

childbirth.definition: The fact or action of giving birth to a child, as the culmination of pregnancy.

sabbath.definition: Saturday, observed in Judaism and some Christian denominations as a day of rest and worship.
sabbath.example: The Sabbath is the holy day in Judaism and Christianity.
sabbath.exampleZh: 安息日是猶太教和基督教的聖日。

showdown.definition: The final battle between two nemeses, in which there can be but one victor.
showdown.example: It's the final showdown between good and evil.
showdown.exampleZh: 這是正義與邪惡的最後對決。

henceforth.definition: From now on; from this time on.
henceforth.example: I will try to do a better job, henceforth, now that I know the proper technique!
henceforth.exampleZh: 既然我知道了正確的技術，今後我會努力做得更好！

sitter.definition: Someone who sits, e.g. for a portrait.
sitter.example: It's always such a pain to get a sitter on short notice.
sitter.exampleZh: 在短時間內找到保母總是很痛苦。

molten.definition: To change (or to be changed) from a solid state to a liquid state, usually by a gradual heat.
molten.example: The crane accidentally dropped the pot of molten metal.
molten.exampleZh: 起重機不小心掉落了熔化的金屬罐。

charger.definition: A device that charges or recharges
charger.example: Put the batteries in the charger overnight so we can use them tomorrow.
charger.exampleZh: 將電池放在充電器中過夜，以便我們明天可以使用它們。

catfish.definition: Any fish of the order Siluriformes, mainly found in fresh water, lacking scales, and having barbels like whiskers around the mouth

glitch.example: My computer crashed because of a glitch.
glitch.exampleZh: 我的電腦因故障而崩潰了。

porcelain.definition: The plant Smilax china, a liana of much of eastern Asia.
porcelain.example: Her hobby is collecting porcelain figurines.
porcelain.exampleZh: 她的愛好是收集瓷雕像。

flawed.example: Flawed diamonds are generally not used in jewellery.
flawed.exampleZh: 有缺陷的鑽石一般不用於珠寶。

scarcely.example: One could scarcely find any trout in the stream without the stocking program.
scarcely.exampleZh: 如果沒有放養計劃，人們幾乎不可能在溪流中找到鱒魚。

firepower.definition: The capacity of a weapon to deliver fire onto a target
firepower.example: France couldn't overwhelm Algerian independence fighters with its firepower.
firepower.exampleZh: 法國的火力無法壓倒阿爾及利亞獨立戰士。

roach.definition: Certain members of the fish family Cyprinidae, including:
roach.example: He noticed a roach on the wall.
roach.exampleZh: 他注意到牆上有一隻蟑螂。

stairwell.definition: A shaft in a multi-story building enclosing a stairway or staircase.
stairwell.example: They suspect the fire started in the stairwell.
stairwell.exampleZh: 他們懷疑火災是從樓梯間開始的。

snowy.definition: Marked by snow, characterized by snow.

negligence.exampleZh: 事故是由於疏忽而發生的。

frantic.definition: A person who is insane or mentally unstable, madman.
frantic.example: They returned the missing child to his frantic mother.
frantic.exampleZh: 他們把失蹤的孩子還給了他瘋狂的母親。

forks.definition: A pronged tool having a long straight handle, used for digging, lifting, throwing etc.

pelvis.definition: The large compound bone structure at the base of the spine that supports the legs. It consists of hip bone, sacrum and coccyx.
pelvis.example: The doctor will examine the pelvis and rectum to feel for any blockages.
pelvis.exampleZh: 醫生會檢查骨盆和直腸以感覺是否有任何阻塞。

negroes.definition: A black person; a person of sub-Saharan African descent.
negroes.example: It is strictly prohibited for Negroes to visit those hospitals, libraries, theatres, cinemas, hotels, and restaurants, which are destined for the Whites.
negroes.exampleZh: 嚴格禁止黑人參觀那些為白人準備的醫院、圖書館、劇院、電影院、旅館和餐廳。

freshly.example: The freshly picked flowers will wilt in a few days but for now are still fragrant.
freshly.exampleZh: 剛採摘的花幾天後就會枯萎，但目前仍芬芳。

calves.example: Giraffe calves walk minutes after birth.
calves.exampleZh: 長頸鹿幼崽出生後幾分鐘就會走路。

aloha.example: An image of a fat American tourist wearing an aloha shirt pops up.
aloha.exampleZh: 一個穿著阿羅哈襯衫的胖美國遊客的圖像出現了。

horrifying.definition: To cause to feel extreme apprehension or unease; to cause to experience horror.
horrifying.example: The haunted house was horrifying, from one room to the next I felt more and more like I wasn’t going to survive.
horrifying.exampleZh: 鬼屋太可怕了，從一個房間到另一個房間，我越來越覺得自己活不下去了。

poodle.definition: A breed of dog originating in Europe as hunting dogs, and having heavy, curly coat in a solid color; their shoulder height indicates their classification as standard, medium, miniature, or toy.
poodle.example: She was wearing a poodle skirt circa 1955.
poodle.exampleZh: 1955 年左右，她穿著一條貴賓狗裙。

cider.definition: An alcoholic, often sparkling (carbonated) beverage made from fermented apples; hard cider; apple cider
cider.example: She liked an aged cider. He liked a harder cider.
cider.exampleZh: 她喜歡陳年蘋果酒。他喜歡烈性蘋果酒。

meatball.definition: A ball of minced or ground meat, seasoned and cooked.

boomer.definition: A person born in the postwar years (generally considered in the United States and other Allied countries as between 1946 and the early 1960s), when there was a marked increase in birthrates throughout the Western world following the return of servicemen at the end of World War II.
boomer.example: I'm such a boomer; I have no idea how to use this phone.
boomer.exampleZh: 我是一個嬰兒潮世代；我不知道如何使用這款手機。

gallon.definition: A unit of volume, equivalent to eight pints
gallon.example: Edmundo gave Rima a gallon of water.
gallon.exampleZh: 艾德蒙多給了瑞瑪一加侖水。

chestnut.definition: A tree or shrub of the genus Castanea.

syphilis.definition: A disease spread via sexual activity, caused by the bacterium Treponema pallidum.
syphilis.example: Kalman contracted syphilis in his younger years.
syphilis.exampleZh: 卡爾曼年輕時感染了梅毒。

trainee.definition: Someone who is still in the process of being formally trained in a workplace.
trainee.example: She works as an office trainee.

rambo.example: It's just a myth that Rambo can defeat an army alone.
rambo.exampleZh: 蘭博可以獨自擊敗一支軍隊，這只是一個神話。

farmhouse.exampleZh: 湯姆破壞了廢棄的農舍。

heals.definition: A spell or ability that restores hit points or removes a status ailment.

silicon.definition: A nonmetallic element (symbol Si) with an atomic number of 14 and atomic weight of 28.0855.
silicon.example: Doping modifies the electrical characteristics of silicon.
silicon.exampleZh: 摻雜改變了矽的電特性。

samba.definition: A Brazilian ballroom dance or dance style.
samba.example: I'm the only Brazilian who can't speak Portuguese and dance samba.
samba.exampleZh: 我是唯一不會說葡萄牙語和跳森巴舞的巴西人。

waldo.definition: A remote manipulation system in which a slave device mimics the motions of a master device manipulated directly by the operator.
waldo.example: As Ralph Waldo Emerson puts it, "language is fossil poetry".
waldo.exampleZh: 正如拉爾夫·沃爾多·愛默生所說，「語言是詩歌化石」。

leftover.definition: Something left behind; an excess or remainder.
leftover.example: It's a leftover from yesterday, but it's still perfectly good.
leftover.exampleZh: 這是昨天剩下的，但仍然非常好。

bashed.example: He bashed himself against the door.

slugs.definition: Any of many terrestrial pulmonate gastropod mollusks, having no (or only a rudimentary) shell.

freighter.definition: One who loads a ship, or one who charters and loads a ship.
freighter.example: The freighter transports goods across the sea.

jerky.example: After the apocalypse, Tom and Mary sold zombie jerky from a roadside stand.
jerky.exampleZh: 世界末日過後，湯姆和瑪莉在路邊攤賣殭屍肉乾。

partridge.definition: Any bird of a number of genera in the family Phasianidae, notably in the genera Perdix and Alectoris.
partridge.example: On the first day of Christmas, my true love sent to me a partridge in a pear tree.
partridge.exampleZh: 聖誕節的第一天，我的真愛送我一隻梨樹上的鷓鴣。

solemnly.example: All graduates solemnly received their graduation certificates.
solemnly.exampleZh: 全體畢業生隆重領取畢業證書。

defiance.definition: The feeling, or spirit of being defiant.
defiance.example: Tom's defiance was a big problem for his parents and teachers.
defiance.exampleZh: 湯姆的反抗對他的父母和老師來說是一個大問題。

hottie.example: She isn't the only hottie on the face of the earth.
hottie.exampleZh: 她不是地球上唯一的辣妹。

stripping.definition: To remove or take away, often in strips or stripes.

invaluable.definition: Of great value; costly, precious, priceless.

illegitimate.definition: A person born to unmarried parents.

makeover.definition: A major change in the use of something, or in the appearance of something or someone; a radical transformation.
makeover.example: This room is a mess; it needs a makeover.
makeover.exampleZh: 這個房間亂七八糟；它需要改造。

blender.definition: A machine outfitted with sharp blades, for mashing, crushing or liquefying food ingredients.
blender.example: After using the blender, wash the blades and container thoroughly.
blender.exampleZh: 使用攪拌機後，徹底清洗刀片和容器。

unprofessional.definition: One who is not a professional.

scanned.definition: To examine sequentially, carefully, or critically; to scrutinize; to behold closely.
scanned.example: She scanned the passage carefully but could not find what she was looking for.
scanned.exampleZh: 她仔細地瀏覽這段文字，卻找不到她要找的東西。

tourism.definition: The act of travelling or sightseeing, particularly away from one's home.
tourism.example: libel tourism; suicide tourism; sex tourism
tourism.exampleZh: 誹謗旅遊業；自殺旅遊；性旅遊

viagra.example: I don't want to imagine ever looking up "Viagra" on Wikipedia.
viagra.exampleZh: 我不想想像在維基百科上查找「威而鋼」。

rebirth.definition: Reincarnation; new birth subsequent to one's first.
rebirth.example: Bennu is the ancient Egyptian deity linked with the Sun, creation and rebirth.
rebirth.exampleZh: 貝努 (Bennu) 是古埃及的神祇，與太陽、創造和重生有關。

vendor.definition: A person or a company that vends or sells.
vendor.example: Mary bought a handmade necklace from a local vendor.
vendor.exampleZh: 瑪麗從當地供應商那裡買了一條手工製作的項鍊。

illiterate.definition: An illiterate person, one not able to read and write.

labyrinth.definition: A maze-like structure built by Daedalus in Knossos, containing the Minotaur.
labyrinth.example: People are blindly and aimlessly walking in the labyrinth of the present.
labyrinth.exampleZh: 人們盲目地、漫無目的地走在當下的迷宮。

unthinkable.exampleZh: 德米特里犯下了難以想像的事。

flair.definition: A natural or innate talent or aptitude.
flair.example: to have a flair for art

frail.definition: A basket made of rushes, used chiefly to hold figs and raisins.
frail.example: The elderly woman was frail but feisty.
frail.exampleZh: 老婦人雖然身體虛弱，但精神抖擻。

heavyweight.definition: A very large, heavy, or impressive person.

planetary.example: Many envision that Mars will be humanity's second planetary home.
planetary.exampleZh: 許多人設想火星將成為人類的第二個行星家園。

nutty.example: This is a nutty chocolate bar.
nutty.exampleZh: 這是一塊堅果巧克力棒。

observatory.definition: A place where stars, planets and other celestial bodies are observed, usually through a telescope; also place for observing meteorological or other natural phenomena.
observatory.example: Benedito's date was into astronomy, so they went to an observatory.
observatory.exampleZh: 貝內迪託的約會對像是天文學，所以他們去了天文台。

diplomacy.definition: The art and practice of conducting international relations by negotiating alliances, treaties, agreements etc., bilaterally or multilaterally, between states and sometimes international organizations, or even between polities with varying status, such as those of monarchs and their princely vassals.
diplomacy.example: National diplomacy typically deploys its dexterity to secure advantage for one's nation.
diplomacy.exampleZh: 國家外交通常會運用其靈活性來確保國家的優勢。

caterpillar.definition: The larva of a butterfly or moth; leafworm.
caterpillar.example: The bird just ate that green caterpillar.
caterpillar.exampleZh: 那隻鳥剛剛吃掉了那條綠色的毛毛蟲。

extravagant.definition: Exceeding the bounds of something; roving; hence, foreign.
extravagant.exampleZh: 奢侈的行為、讚揚或辱罵

skeptical.example: I can see why people are so skeptical [sic] about him, but I think he's on to something here. (regarded by organizations such as the BBC as an error)
skeptical.exampleZh: 我可以理解為什麼人們對他如此懷疑[原文如此]，但我認為他在這裡有所作為。 （被 BBC 等組織視為錯誤）

chainsaw.definition: A saw that has a power-driven and fast-revolving chain of metal teeth, usually used to cut trees.
chainsaw.example: He used a chainsaw to cut through the fallen tree on the roadway.
chainsaw.exampleZh: 他用電鋸鋸斷了路上倒下的樹。

prudent.definition: Sagacious in adapting means to ends; circumspect in action, or in determining any line of conduct; careful, discreet, sensible; — opposed to rash; directed by prudence or wise forethought; evincing prudence
prudent.example: His prudent career moves reliably brought him to the top
prudent.exampleZh: 他謹慎的職業生涯可靠地將他帶到了頂峰

healthier.definition: Enjoying health and vigor of body, mind, or spirit: well.

pints.definition: A unit of volume, equivalent to:
pints.example: Please leave three pints tomorrow, milkman.
pints.exampleZh: 請明天留三品脫，送奶工。

rudder.definition: An underwater vane used to steer a vessel. The rudder is controlled by means of a wheel, tiller or other apparatus (modern vessels can be controlled even with a joystick or an autopilot).
rudder.example: The pilot moves rudder left and right, with left and right pedals.
rudder.exampleZh: 飛行員用左右踏板左右移動方向舵。

lollipop.definition: An item of confectionery consisting of a piece of candy/sweet attached to a stick.

blizzard.definition: A large snowstorm accompanied by strong winds and greatly reduced visibility caused by blowing snow.

stride.exampleZh: 今天，我將滿懷信心地闊步前進。

weirder.definition: Having an unusually strange character or behaviour.
weirder.example: Things got weirder over the next couple of days.
weirder.exampleZh: 接下來的幾天事情變得更加奇怪。

administer.definition: To cause to ingest (a drug), either by openly offering or through deceit.
administer.example: I know how to administer injections.

fireball.definition: A ball of fire, especially one associated with an explosion.
fireball.example: Fireball, an orange tabby cat, loves to terrorize all the cats in the neighborhood.
fireball.exampleZh: 火球是一隻橘色虎斑貓，喜歡恐嚇附近的所有貓。

obeyed.definition: To do as ordered by (a person, institution etc), to act according to the bidding of.

swain.definition: A young man or boy in service; a servant.
swain.example: Like as a fire, when Southern gusts are rude, / falls on the standing harvest of the plain, / or torrent, hurtling with a mountain flood, / whelms field and oxen's toil and smiling grain, / and rolls whole forests headlong to the main, / while, weetless of the noise, on neighbouring height, / tranced in mute wonder, stands the listening swain.
swain.exampleZh: 就像一場大火，當南方的狂風猛烈時，/落在平原上的莊稼上，/或激流中，帶著山洪猛衝，/席捲了田野和牛的辛勞和微笑的穀物，/把整個森林推向主幹，/同時，在鄰近的高處，無聲無息，/在沉默的奇蹟中恍惚地站著聆聽的情人。

booster.example: When did you get your last tetanus booster?
booster.exampleZh: 您最後一次注射破傷風加強針是什麼時候？

erratic.definition: A rock moved from one location to another, usually by a glacier.
erratic.example: Henry has been getting erratic scores on his tests: 40% last week, but 98% this week.
erratic.exampleZh: 亨利的測驗成績一直不穩定：上週為 40%，但本週為 98%。

undergo.definition: To go or move under or beneath.
undergo.exampleZh: 每個人總有一天都會經歷死亡。

typed.definition: To put text on paper using a typewriter.

ports.definition: A place on the coast at which ships can shelter, or dock to load and unload cargo or passengers.
ports.example: Each eight has four ports and four starboards.
ports.exampleZh: 每八艘船都有四個左舷和四個右舷。

salami.definition: A large cured meat sausage of Italian origin, served in slices.
salami.example: I would like a sandwich with salami.
salami.exampleZh: 我想要一份加薩拉米香腸的三明治。

ulcer.definition: An open sore of the skin, eyes or mucous membrane, often caused by an initial abrasion and generally maintained by an inflammation and/or an infection.

dementia.definition: A progressive decline in cognitive function due to damage or disease in the brain beyond what might be expected from normal aging. Areas particularly affected include memory, attention, judgement, language and problem solving.
dementia.example: Donald Trump is suffering from dementia.
dementia.exampleZh: 唐納德·特朗普患有癡呆症。

arthritis.definition: Inflammation of a joint or joints causing pain and/or disability, swelling and stiffness, and due to various causes such as infection, trauma, degenerative changes or metabolic disorders.
arthritis.exampleZh: 西葫蘆有助於治療關節炎。

juvie.example: Have you ever been in juvie?
juvie.exampleZh: 你曾經進過少年監獄嗎？

volatile.definition: A chemical or compound that changes into a gas easily.
volatile.example: The geopolitical situation is very volatile.
volatile.exampleZh: 地緣政治局勢非常不穩定。

seaman.definition: A mariner or sailor, one who mans a ship. Opposed to landman or landsman.
seaman.example: The seaman had to clean the ship down to the copper bolts.
seaman.exampleZh: 海員必須把船清理乾淨，直到銅螺栓。

beseech.example: But he said: I beseech thee, Lord, send whom thou wilt send.
beseech.exampleZh: 但他說：主啊，我求你差遣你願意差遣的人。

miscarriage.definition: A failure; a mistake or error.

racer.definition: Someone who takes part in a race.
racer.example: Cycling through slush on a racer isn't wise, but this year there's no alternative.
racer.exampleZh: 騎著賽車穿越雪泥並不明智，但今年別無選擇。

plots.definition: (authorship) The course of a story, comprising a series of incidents which are gradually unfolded, sometimes by unexpected means.
plots.exampleZh: 你到處都可以看到情節。

vents.definition: An opening through which gases, especially air, can pass.

soften.definition: To make something soft or softer.
soften.example: Soften the butter before beating in the sugar.
soften.exampleZh: 在加入糖之前先軟化奶油。

unfamiliar.example: Venturing into unfamiliar territory takes courage.
unfamiliar.exampleZh: 進入陌生的領域需要勇氣。

foggy.definition: Obscured by mist or fog; unclear; hazy
foggy.example: He was still foggy with sleep.

monarchy.definition: A government in which sovereignty is embodied within a single, today usually hereditary head of state (whether as a figurehead or as a powerful ruler).
monarchy.exampleZh: 列支敦士登是君主立憲制國家。

deemed.definition: To judge, to pass judgment on; to doom, to sentence.
deemed.exampleZh: 她認為他的努力還不夠。

herpes.definition: A viral infection, caused by Human alphaherpesvirus 1 and Human alphaherpesvirus 2, marked by painful, watery blisters in the skin or mucous membranes or on the genitals.
herpes.example: She gave herpes to almost everyone on the tour.
herpes.exampleZh: 她把皰疹傳染給了巡迴演出中的幾乎每個人。

beginner.definition: Someone who is just starting at something, or has only recently started.
beginner.example: I'm new to learning Japanese: I'm just a beginner.
beginner.exampleZh: 我是學習日語的新手：我只是個初學者。

reins.definition: A strap or rope attached to a bridle or bit, used to control a horse, animal or young child.
reins.example: Golden reins do not make a better horse.
reins.exampleZh: 金韁繩並不能造就更好的馬。

viewed.example: The video was viewed by millions of people.
viewed.exampleZh: 該影片有數百萬人觀看。

nebula.definition: A cloud in outer space consisting of gas or dust (e.g. a cloud formed after a star explodes).
nebula.example: We don't yet know which stars were formed in the same nebula as our sun.
nebula.exampleZh: 我們還不知道哪些恆星是在與太陽相同的星雲中形成的。

hearty.definition: A term of familiar address and fellowship among sailors.
hearty.example: a hearty welcome;  hearty in supporting the government.
hearty.exampleZh: 熱烈的歡迎；  衷心支持政府。

fussy.definition: Anxious or particular about petty details.

collier.definition: A person in the business or occupation of producing (digging or mining) coal or making charcoal or in its transporting or commerce.
collier.example: The ship was a collier, built to carry tons of coal along the coast.
collier.exampleZh: 這艘船是一艘煤炭船，旨在沿著海岸運輸數噸煤炭。

mammoth.definition: Any species of the extinct genus Mammuthus, of large, usually hairy, elephant-like mammals with long curved tusks and an inclined back, which became extinct with the last retreat of ice age glaciers during the late Pleistocene period, and are known from fossils, frozen carcasses, and Paleolithic cave paintings found in North America and Eurasia.
mammoth.exampleZh: 猛獁象社會可能是母系社會。

diameter.definition: Any straight line between two points on the circumference of a circle that passes through the centre/center of the circle.
diameter.example: Atherosclerosis reduces the inner diameter of arteries.
diameter.exampleZh: 動脈粥狀硬化會減少動脈內徑。

stakeout.definition: The act of watching a location and/or people, generally covertly.
stakeout.example: The police had a stakeout in place where they expected the crime to occur.
stakeout.exampleZh: 警方在預計犯罪發生的地方進行了監視。

intoxicated.definition: To stupefy by doping with chemical substances such as alcohol.

submission.definition: The act of submitting or yielding; surrender.
submission.exampleZh: 提交內容會被自動標記。

prostate.example: In my opinion, you suffer from prostate problems.
prostate.exampleZh: 在我看來，你患有攝護腺問題。

aneurysm.definition: An abnormal blood-filled swelling of an artery or vein, resulting from a localized weakness in the wall of the vessel.
aneurysm.example: Tom died from a brain aneurysm.

sulking.definition: To express ill humor or offence by remaining sullenly silent or withdrawn.
sulking.exampleZh: 齊瑞生氣地怒氣沖沖地走了。

mortuary.definition: A place where dead bodies are stored prior to burial or cremation.
mortuary.example: Tom's corpse is in the mortuary now.
mortuary.exampleZh: 湯姆的屍體現在在太平間。

serenity.definition: The state of being serene; calmness; peacefulness.
serenity.example: The beauty of nature inspires serenity.
serenity.exampleZh: 自然之美讓人心曠神怡。

mixer.definition: One who, or a device that, mixes or merges things together.
mixer.example: Yanni has just installed a new bath mixer.
mixer.exampleZh: 雅尼剛安裝了一個新的浴缸龍頭。

zapping.example: They spent the whole movie zapping bad guys into oblivion.
zapping.exampleZh: 他們整部電影都在將壞人消滅殆盡。

tania.example: I cannot greet Tania in Slovene. I don't know this language.
tania.exampleZh: 我無法在斯洛維尼亞問候塔尼亞。我不懂這種語言。

commentary.definition: A series of comments or annotations; especially, a book of explanations or expositions on the whole or a part of some other work
commentary.example: Tom's running commentary made it impossible to focus on the film.
commentary.exampleZh: 湯姆的連續解說讓他無法集中註意力在電影上。

onward.definition: To keep going; to progress or persevere.
onward.example: There was an onward rush as the gates opened.
onward.exampleZh: 當大門打開時，人們湧入。

waffle.definition: A flat pastry pressed with a grid pattern.

cleanup.definition: The act of cleaning or tidying something.
cleanup.example: Jones will be batting cleanup in tonight's game.
cleanup.exampleZh: 瓊斯將在今晚的比賽中擊出清理球。

neurotic.definition: A person who has a neurosis
neurotic.example: He is getting neurotic about time-keeping.
neurotic.exampleZh: 他對遵守時間越來越神經質了。

unnoticed.exampleZh: 你的善意永遠不會被忽視。

deluxe.definition: Very fine in quality or luxurious.
deluxe.example: What is the difference between a deluxe room and a standard room?
deluxe.exampleZh: 豪華房和標準房有什麼差別？

tanker.definition: A tank ship, a vessel used to transport large quantities of liquid.
tanker.example: I swung the tanker around just in time to take off with the lip
tanker.exampleZh: 我及時調轉油輪，用唇緣起飛

obsolete.definition: (of words, equipment, etc.) No longer in use; gone into disuse; disused or neglected (often by preference for something newer, which replaces the subject).
obsolete.example: It is speculated that, within a few years, the Internet's speedy delivery of news worldwide will make newspapers obsolete.
obsolete.exampleZh: 據推測，幾年之內，互聯網在全球範圍內快速傳播新聞將使報紙變得過時。

snowman.definition: A humanoid figure made with large snowballs stacked on each other. Human traits like a face and arms may be fashioned with sticks (arms), a carrot (nose), and stones or coal (eyes, mouth).
snowman.exampleZh: 他把雪人帶到了市中心。

geisha.definition: A Japanese female entertainer skilled in various arts such as tea ceremony, dancing, singing and calligraphy.

maturity.definition: The state of being mature, ready or ripe.
maturity.example: Some foods and drinks, like wine, only reach their full taste at maturity, which literally comes at a price
maturity.exampleZh: 有些食物和飲料，例如葡萄酒，只有在成熟時才能達到其全部味道，這實際上是有代價的

impostor.definition: Someone who attempts to deceive by using an assumed name or identity.

sheik.definition: The leader of an Arab village, family or small tribe.
sheik.example: Sheik is a term synonymous with great power, respect, and wealth, and often religion.
sheik.exampleZh: 謝赫這個字是偉大權力、尊重和財富的代名詞，而且常常是宗教的代名詞。

surfer.definition: A person who rides a surfboard.
surfer.exampleZh: 湯姆是一名職業衝浪者。

bridegroom.definition: A man in the context of his own wedding; one who is going to marry or has just been married.
bridegroom.example: Matthew is soon to be married; he will make a very handsome bridegroom.
bridegroom.exampleZh: 馬修即將結婚；他會成為一個非常英俊的新郎。

defective.definition: A person or thing considered to be defective.

tumble.definition: A fall, especially end over end.
tumble.example: I took a tumble down the stairs and broke my tooth.
tumble.exampleZh: 我從樓梯上摔下來，摔斷了牙齒。

tombstone.definition: A headstone marking a person's grave.
tombstone.example: A touching inscription was etched into the tombstone.
tombstone.exampleZh: 墓碑上刻著一段感人的銘文。

hospitalized.definition: To send to hospital; to admit (a person) to hospital.

deuce.definition: A card with two pips, one of four in a standard deck of playing cards.
deuce.example: I've gotta go drop a deuce.

significantly.definition: In a significant manner or to a significant extent.

newcomer.definition: One who has recently come to a community; a recent arrival.
newcomer.exampleZh: 他是個充滿熱情的新人。

picket.definition: A stake driven into the ground.

youngster.example: My youngster often makes careless decisions.
youngster.exampleZh: 我的孩子經常做出粗心的決定。

pendant.definition: A supporting post attached to the main rafter.
pendant.example: One vase is the pendant to the other vase.
pendant.exampleZh: 一個花瓶是另一個花瓶的吊飾。

riddance.definition: The act of being rid of something; deliverance
riddance.exampleZh: 西爾維奧·貝盧斯科尼終於擺脫了。

insomnia.definition: A sleeping disorder that is known for its symptoms of unrest and the inability to sleep.

harmonica.definition: A musical wind instrument with a series of holes for the player to blow into, each hole producing a different note
harmonica.example: My favorite instrument is the harmonica.
harmonica.exampleZh: 我最喜歡的樂器是口琴。

pasture.definition: Land, specifically, an open field, on which livestock is kept for feeding.
pasture.example: The farmer pastures fifty oxen; the land will pasture forty cows.
pasture.exampleZh: 農夫放牧五十頭牛；這塊土地可以放牧四十頭牛。

heartache.definition: Very sincere and difficult emotional problems or stress
heartache.example: My arms avenge my heartache in the hug they can finally have.
heartache.exampleZh: 我的雙臂終於可以擁抱我，以報復我的心痛。

horrified.exampleZh: 費奧多爾看起來很驚恐。

rivalry.definition: An ongoing relationship between (usually two) rivals who compete for superiority.
rivalry.example: James and Polly have a bitter rivalry due to the latter's inclusion in the Tea Time Teaser.
rivalry.exampleZh: 由於波莉出現在下午茶預告片中，詹姆斯和波莉展開了激烈的競爭。

democrat.definition: A supporter of democracy; an advocate of democratic politics (originally as opposed to the aristocrats in Revolutionary France).

lovebirds.definition: Any small parrot from one of the nine species within the genus Agapornis. Sometimes they are kept as cage birds and are noted for their affection towards each other.
lovebirds.example: He left with a smirk on his face, leaving the two lovebirds alone.
lovebirds.exampleZh: 他臉上帶著壞笑離開，留下兩個情侶。

peeking.definition: To look slyly, or with the eyes half closed, or through a crevice; to peep.

talisman.definition: A magical object providing protection against ill will, or the supernatural, or conferring the wearer with a boon such as good luck, good health, or power(s).
talisman.example: The talisman he's wearing is supposed to ward off evil spirits.
talisman.exampleZh: 他所佩戴的護身符應該可以辟邪。

stats.definition: A mathematical science concerned with data collection, presentation, analysis, and interpretation.
stats.example: Honey, wake up! New stats and graphs have just been published.
stats.exampleZh: 親愛的，醒來吧！新的統計數據和圖表剛剛發布。

intake.definition: The place where water, air or other fluid is taken into a pipe or conduit; opposed to outlet.

arsenic.definition: A nonmetallic chemical element (symbol As) with an atomic number of 33.
arsenic.example: Contaminants included arsenic, copper, cadmium, lead and other metals.
arsenic.exampleZh: 污染物包括砷、銅、鎘、鉛和其他金屬。

sheikh.definition: The leader of an Arab village, family or small tribe.
sheikh.example: Sami was cooling his heels in Sharm al-Sheikh.
sheikh.exampleZh: 薩米在沙姆沙伊赫冷靜下來。
